allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive game development agent team configuration

- Created 6-person specialist agent team for game development
  * GameDesigner: Game mechanics and balancing
  * AIEngineer: Utility AI system optimization  
  * SystemsArchitect: Architecture and performance
  * UIUXDesigner: Interface and user experience
  * QAAnalyst: Quality assurance and testing
  * DataScientist: Data analysis and insights

- Environment-specific configuration system
  * Development: Full debugging and monitoring
  * Production: Optimized performance settings
  * Testing: Deterministic testing environment
  * Local template: Personal settings with security

- Security enhancements in .gitignore
  * API keys and credentials protection
  * Database connection strings
  * Personal configuration files
  * Build artifacts and logs

- ConfigManager integration for dynamic settings
  * Runtime environment loading
  * Centralized configuration management
  * GameManager integration

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
